name: company-valuation
description: > Estimate the intrinsic value of a public company using DCF, relative (peer multiple) and sum-of-parts (SOTP) methods, then triangulate to an implied share price with upside/downside versus the current market price. Use this skill whenever the user asks: "what is AAPL worth", "valuation of NVDA", "fair value of TSLA", "intrinsic value", "DCF for MSFT", "build a DCF", "discounted cash flow", "WACC", "terminal value", "implied share price", "upside to fair value", "is X overvalued/undervalued", "
author: himself65
summary_zh: 这是一款估算上市公司内在价值的工具，能算出股票的合理价格与潜在涨跌空间，适合想判断某只股票是高估还是低估、或需要计算其公允价值时使用。
